title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build and deploy ML models in Python (PyTorch, scikit-learn). Experience with AWS, Docker, and CI/CD. Collaborate on NLP features and model monitoring.

title: Full Stack Developer (React / Node)
description: TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, REST APIs. Agile delivery, Git, code reviews, and automated testing.

title: Data Analyst
description: SQL, Excel, Power BI, dashboards, stakeholder communication. Python a plus for automation.

title: Cloud DevOps Engineer
description: Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS or Azure, observability, incident response, security baselines.
